/usr/bin/gcc -fPIC -Wall -g -DACL_MAX_DEVICES=64 -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L -D_XOPEN_SOURCE=700 -D_GNU_SOURCE -DPDL_SATELLITE_SUPPORT=1 -DPDL_BMC_SUPPORT=1 -DPDL_MCU_SUPPORT=1 -DPDL_WATCHDOG_SUPPORT=1 -DPCL_PLATFORM_TI_AM625=1 -DPCL_PRODUCT_H200_100P=1 -shared -Wl,-soname,libacl.so -o libacl.so CMakeFiles/acl.dir/src/acl_api.c.o CMakeFiles/acl.dir/src/acl_api_v2.c.o CMakeFiles/acl.dir/src/acl_telemetry_cache.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_collector/build/pdl:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_collector/build/pcl:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_collector/build/hal:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm/apps/ccm_collector/build/osal ../pdl/libpdl.so ../pcl/libpcl.so ../hal/libhal.so ../osal/libosal.so -lpthread -lrt -lm
